creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you capture a dmesg using a serial console?  The LSI SAS1078 is 
well-supported by the mfi(4) driver, so it should see any volumes that 
are configured.  I assume you've configured a RAID-1 volume using the 
BIOS and that the BIOS sees the volume during boot?

-- 
John Baldwin
